chk_salary_range.name: chk_salary_range
chk_salary_range.value: "jobs"."salary_type" != 'range' OR ("jobs"."salary_min" IS NOT NULL AND "jobs"."salary_max" IS NOT NULL)

chk_salary_currency.name: chk_salary_currency
chk_salary_currency.value: "jobs"."salary_type" IS NULL OR "jobs"."currency" IS NOT NULL

chk_salary_min_max.name: chk_salary_min_max
chk_salary_min_max.value: "jobs"."salary_min" IS NULL OR "jobs"."salary_max" IS NULL OR "jobs"."salary_max" >= "jobs"."salary_min"
